notes: Case 2005-07 was found out of order by the SJC and was not heard on the merits. The case appears only as a docket list entry in the SJC report. It is listed alongside other cases (2005-02, 2005-03, 2005-04, 2005-06, 2005-10, 2005-11, 2005-12, 2005-13, 2006-01, 2006-03, and 2006-04) that were determined to be procedurally defective.
